title: Best "Faces of Evil" dub there is
description:
Me and Laretski voiceacted the Faces of Evil intro, BACKWARDS!!!
then we just reversed it and this is the outcome, lol

Pyrstoyska: Link & Zelda
Laretski: The King & Gwonam

Feel free to poop this if you are in the mood...
